svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" version="26.0.9"> <diagram name="Builder Lifecycle" id="pagebuilder-builder-lifecycle"> <mxGraphModel dx="1100" dy="700" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="820" pageHeight="260" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Builder lifecycle" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;fontColor=#1F2937;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="20" width="780" height="30" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="begin" value="Begin() - open scope" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#2563EB;fillColor=#DBEAFE;fontColor=#1E3A8A;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="60" y="100" width="140" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="content" value="Nested content - child builders render" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#7C3AED;fillColor=#EDE9FE;fontColor=#4C1D95;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="270" y="100" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="dispose" value="Dispose() - close scope" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#059669;fillColor=#D1FAE5;fontColor=#064E3B;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="500" y="100" width="140" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="page" value="PageInformation - assets + metadata" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#D97706;fillColor=#FEF3C7;fontColor=#92400E;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="330" y="190" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
